creator: nsonack@herrhotzenplotz.de
text:
Created attachment 257997
Updated Patch for both changes in ports and update to version 1.6

I cleaned up the bugs that arose from all the changes in ports.
Also bumped the version to 1.6.
Tested in Poudriere against FreeBSD 14.2-RELEASE on amd64 with ports on main: https://poudriere.herrhotzenplotz.de/build.html?mastername=142amd64-wrk&build=2025-02-26_17h31m26s
Did a smoke test and it seems to work.
